message:
fix(migration): NaN/Inf fail-closed guards in bpet_migration_gate admission and rollout health

IEEE 754 NaN >= threshold evaluates to false, causing evaluate_admission()
to silently return Allow and evaluate_rollout_health() to skip rollback
when f64 trajectory scores are NaN/Inf. Added is_finite() guards on all
6 f64 threshold comparisons across 3 functions. Sister module
dgis_migration_gate already had this guard on cascade_risk_delta.

Fixes: bd-2qin
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
